# FoneClaw

FoneClaw is an independent Android AI phone assistant.

Website: https://www.foneclaw.ai
Download: https://www.foneclaw.ai/download.html
Features: https://www.foneclaw.ai/features.html

## Short description

FoneClaw helps Android users complete supported phone actions by voice. It is built for practical Android workflows such as checking phone status, summarizing notifications, reading SMS, sending messages, adjusting settings, opening apps, capturing screenshots, understanding visible screen content, and completing multi-step tasks with user confirmation where needed.

## Key facts

- Category: Android AI phone assistant
- Platform: Android 9.0+
- Root access: not required
- Product status: independent product
- Manufacturer ownership: not owned by Xiaomi, Google, Samsung, Apple, or any phone maker
- Pricing: core features are free
- Slogan: Say it. Done.
- Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, French, German, Arabic, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian

## Main use cases

- Daily brief and notification summaries
- Phone health and device status checks
- Hands-free messaging and calls
- Android system controls
- Screen reading and screenshot understanding
- App and browser workflows
- Passive triggers and routine phone tasks

## Important wording

Use: supported Android phone actions, supported Android workflows, Android AI phone assistant, independent Android product.

Avoid: unrestricted control, every app, entire phone, 100% private, 100% local, or manufacturer-owned positioning.
